concerns.text: FR-002 requires computing centrality for 'each of the parcellated regions' (~90), but tasks T020 and T021 restrict calculation to 'fixed regions (AAL3 indices 1-10)'. No task exists to compute metrics for the remaining ~80 regions, leaving the core scientific requirement unimplemented.

FR-002 and US-2 require computing three distinct metrics (degree, betweenness, eigenvector) to test collinearity (VIF) and specific associations. Task T023 aggregates these into a 'single global centrality score' immediately. No task exists to retain, store, or analyze the individual metrics required for the VIF check (T022) or the specific metric associations mandated by the spec.

FR-004.1 requires Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction 'if regional-level analysis is performed'. Since tasks T020-T021 hardcode the analysis to only 10 regions (violating FR-002), the condition for regional analysis never triggers. No task exists to implement the full regional analysis (~90 regions) required to make FR-004.1 testable.

FR-003 and Edge Cases require Mean Framewise Displacement (FD) to be calculated and used as a covariate in the regression model. Task T026 implements FD calculation in Phase 5 (Validation), but the regression model (T024) is in Phase 4. No task exists to calculate FD in Phase 2/3 to feed the regression model, creating a missing dependency for FR-003.

Task IDs T024 and T025 are duplicated. T024 is used for 'Integration test for regression model fitting' (US2) and 'Contract test for permutation test logic' (US3). T025 is used for 'Integration test for cross-validation loop' (US3) and 'Generate scatter plot' (US2). This ID collision prevents unique task tracking.
